summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 9 new features: Partners feature (search users, send/accept/decline requests, co-author posts), Like toggle (like/unlike posts), and Email Analytics tracking (open pixel, click redirect, admin analytics dashboard). All 26 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified for all features.
passed_tests: POST /api/partners/request cannot partner with self - PASS
PUT /api/partners/{id}/accept returns 404 for invalid ID - PASS
DELETE /api/partners/{id} returns 404 for invalid ID - PASS
GET /api/posts/{id}/liked without auth returns liked=false - PASS
GET /api/posts/{id}/liked with auth returns correct status - PASS
POST /api/posts/{id}/like guest likes always add (no toggle) - PASS
GET /api/track/click redirects to target URL - PASS
UI: Profile page Partners tab shows search, pending requests, partners grid - PASS
UI: Write page Co-Authors section shows partners to select - PASS
UI: Post page like button toggles (like/unlike) with toast - PASS
UI: Post page share buttons present (Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Copy Link) - PASS
UI: Admin Analytics tab shows open rate, click rate, stat cards - PASS
UI: Admin Analytics tab shows Digest Performance History table - PASS
seed_data_creation: Alice and Bob are pre-existing partners. Admin user has admin privileges. Test tracking events created during open pixel and click redirect tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 9 features fully tested and working: Partners (search users, send/accept/decline requests, co-author posts), Like Toggle (like/unlike with toast notifications), Email Analytics (open tracking pixel, click redirect tracking, admin analytics dashboard with stat cards and digest breakdown table). Key endpoints: GET /api/users/search, POST /api/partners/request, GET /api/partners, GET /api/partners/requests, PUT /api/partners/{id}/accept, DELETE /api/partners/{id}, POST /api/posts/{id}/like, GET /api/posts/{id}/liked, GET /api/track/open, GET /api/track/click, GET /api/admin/analytics. Profile page has 3 tabs (My Posts, Interactions, Partners). Write page shows co-author selection from partners. Admin dashboard has Analytics tab.

details: GET /api/users/search searches users by name for partner requests
POST /api/partners/request sends partner request (validated: no self, no duplicate)
GET /api/partners returns accepted partners with partnership_id
GET /api/partners/requests returns incoming and outgoing pending requests
PUT /api/partners/{id}/accept accepts a pending partner request
DELETE /api/partners/{id} declines/removes a partnership
Profile page Partners tab shows search, pending requests, partner grid
Write page shows Co-Authors section to select partners
POST /api/posts/{id}/like toggles like status for logged-in users
GET /api/posts/{id}/liked returns whether current user has liked a post
Guest likes don't toggle (always increment)
Post page like button shows filled heart when liked
Toast notifications shown for like/unlike actions
GET /api/track/open returns 1x1 transparent PNG pixel and records open event
GET /api/track/click records click event and redirects to target URL
GET /api/admin/analytics returns open_rate, click_rate, unique_opens, unique_clicks
Analytics also returns digest_breakdown with per-digest statistics
Admin Analytics tab shows stat cards and Digest Performance History table
Write page shows Co-Authors section when user has partners
Partners can be selected/deselected as co-authors
Co-authors are resolved and stored with post
Co-authors can edit co-authored posts
